REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, PLAINTIFF 994 CAPP ST, LLC AND JOHNSON HONG'S MOTION FOR STAY OF PROCEEDINGS TO ALLOW PARTIES TO MEDIATE IS GRANTED. THE MATTER IS STAYED FOR 180 DAYS TO ALLOW THE PARTIES TO MEDIATE PURSUANT TO THE PURCHASE AGREEMENT. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE CHARLES F. Notice Of Plaintiffs Motion And Motion For Stay Of Proceedings To Allow Parties To Mediate
Off Calendar Feb-04-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF 994 CAPP ST, LLC and JOHNSON HONG's Motion For Stay Of Proceedings To Allow Parties To Mediate is GRANTED. The matter is stayed for 180 days to allow the parties to mediate pursuant to the Purchase Agreement. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not reported (D501)
